reviews.review_description: Gave it 5 stars as this is only beta, yet they have made amazing background in the city, along with cars and detailed buildings. This shows how a game like gta could potentially be made. For a free game, this is def worth playing, a lot of fun

developer_response.body:
Thanks for trying out our game! If you enjoyed the environments in The Heist VR, you'll love our new game, coming soon to Oculus App Lab. You can read more about this game on our website: wondersensegames.com.

Tanner Kopel - 
Founder & CEO of WonderSense Games

reviews.review_description: playing gta VR for free its just a good game nothing bad about it just a good game

developer_response.body:
Thanks for trying our game! If you liked this one, you'll definitely have to try our next game, a campaign shooter with a ton of action/explosions! You can check it out here: https://wondersensegames.com/#games. 

Tanner Kopel - 
Founder & CEO of WonderSense Games

reviews.review_description: It’s fun but if you could add an option to turn of turning completely then that would be great cause I have horrible stick drift in my right controller, thanks!

developer_response.body:
Great idea! We'll make sure to add this feature in our next game. 

Tanner Kopel - 
Founder & CEO of WonderSense Games

reviews.review_description: The game is a lot better than the first time I tried it. A lot of the glitches have been fixed, the pistol has magazines now, which feel great, and it's more difficult. Great work so far.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for retrying the game! We're really happy that you enjoyed it, as we worked hard to fix as many of the glitches that we could. If you liked The Heist VR, you'll love our next game, a campaign FPS with tons of action and explosions! If you want to learn more, check out our website: https://wondersensegames.com/#games. 

Tanner Kopel - 
Founder & CEO of WonderSense Games

reviews.review_description: I played you game on my cuzins vr

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing! We're happy you enjoyed it :)

Tanner Kopel -

developer_response.body:

reviews.review_description: I like it but plz let us turn down the music

developer_response.body:
We’re happy to hear you enjoyed our game! We’re currently working on an update to fix some bugs like the loudness of the music. For the mean time, you can turn down the music by pressing the menu button on the left controller and adjusting the volume slider.

Thanks, Tanner - 
WonderSense Games Founder & CEO

reviews.review_description: Didn't let me plant the bomb

So the game is a good game but if you spam the reload button on and gum like the ar you get infinite ammo and it ruins the experience and this was very easy to beat this needs an to have easy medium and hard ￼Difficulty more maps and grenades to Spawn on each map and this game should have a multiplayer feature because I think most of my friend would like this game.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for giving my game a go! I'm glad you enjoyed it. I will look into the infinite ammo bug you mentioned and try to patch it in a future update if there are any. As for the difficulty, there is difficulty settings in the options menu so you can make the game harder. Unfortunately, I do not plan on adding multiplayer, but I am in the process of making a new multiplayer game that will blow The Heist VR out of the water! You can learn more on our website at www.wondersensegames.com.

Tanner Kopel - 
WonderSense Games Founder & CEO

reviews.review_description: Terrible first level doesn’t even have a bomb

developer_response.body:
Thanks for giving our game a try! The bomb is actually on the player's back. To grab the bomb, simply put your hand over your shoulder and press and hold the grip button. While holding the grip button, pull your hand in front of you, and you will see the bomb. If you have any feedback, critiques, or suggestions, don't hesitate to email me at tanner@wondersensegames.com. 

Tanner Kopel - 
Founder & CEO of WonderSense Games

reviews.review_title: really buggy, can’t even pick up guns
reviews.review_description: it takes a lot of work to pick up a gun.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for trying our game! To grab the guns, simply press and hold the grip button when you’re hand is touching the weapon. To grab guns from a distance, point your index finger at the gun until the white ring turns to orange, and then press and hold the grip button and the gun should move to you. If this doesn’t fix the issue, try uninstalling and then re-installing the game.

Thanks, Tanner - 
WonderSense Games Founder & CEO

reviews.review_description: This is a really good game but I cannot find the bomb I looked everywhere they are just nowhere other than that this is a really fun game

developer_response.body:
I'm happy to hear you enjoyed the game! The bomb is actually on the player's back. To grab the bomb, simply put your hand over your shoulder and press and hold the grip button. While holding the grip button, pull your hand in front of you, and you will see the bomb.

Thanks again for playing!

Tanner Kopel - 
Founder & CEO of WonderSense Games

reviews.review_description: Don't hate on it too much, it's a free game

The game is really fun but after you complete a couple robberies it get boring because you can’t do anything else they should add gadgets that make it easier for money and you can get money by completing robberies
Crap

developer_response.body:
Thanks for trying our game! We're sorry it didn't meet your expectations. This game was mainly a way for us to test out the App Lab review process, while providing a short, fun arcade shooter. If your willing to give some feedback on why you didn't enjoy the game, we'd love to hear it. Just email us at tanner@wondersensegames.com with a description of what you think could be improved. 

Tanner Kopel - 
WonderSense Games Founder & CEO

reviews.review_description: Loved the bank robbery, played it all the time but there is one major problem that keeps this game from being perfect: ENEMIES KEEP SPAWNING! And quickly too. The difficulty level was too high and I never completed a heist even once!
so many police
It’s not really worth your time compared to other FREE vr games like Pavlov or battle talent. Don’t expect too much from it.
Weird
I was hoping that there would be some stealth to the game.but no fighting to easy as soon as I enter the bank I get shot at

The game is good but just make some changes like adding swat based on how many cops you kill maybe add civilians to where if you shoot them you lose and maybe add cops taking cover and shooting at you or add more equipment like equipable rifles,shotguns or SMGs or more pistols it doesn’t matter just with


•swat enemies 

•officers taking cover and shooting at you

•different guns

•and civilian NPCs’



It would be much much better

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great feedback! Unfortunately, there are no further updates planned for The Heist VR, but I'll definitely keep these ideas in mind for future games :)
